tasks.label: Run Django Server
tasks.command: zsh -lc 'source venv/bin/activate && if [ -f "../.certs/localhost.pem" ] && [ -f "../.certs/localhost-key.pem" ] && command -v uvicorn >/dev/null 2>&1; then uvicorn core.asgi:application --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --ssl-keyfile ../.certs/localhost-key.pem --ssl-certfile ../.certs/localhost.pem; else python manage.py runserver; fi'

tasks.label: Run React App
tasks.command: zsh -lc 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use && if [ -f "${workspaceFolder}/.certs/localhost.pem" ] && [ -f "${workspaceFolder}/.certs/localhost-key.pem" ]; then HTTPS=true SSL_CRT_FILE="${workspaceFolder}/.certs/localhost.pem" SSL_KEY_FILE="${workspaceFolder}/.certs/localhost-key.pem" npm start; else HTTPS=true npm start; fi'

tasks.label: Run Redis Server
tasks.command: zsh -lc 'redis-cli ping >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "Redis already running on :6379" || redis-server'

tasks.label: Run Celery Worker
tasks.command: source venv/bin/activate && celery -A core worker -l info

tasks.label: Kill All Services
tasks.command: zsh -lc 'pkill -f "python manage.py runserver" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; pkill -f "celery -A core worker" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; pkill -f "react-scripts start" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; pkill -f "stripe listen --forward-to" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; for p in $(lsof -tiTCP:8000 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null); do kill "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; done; for p in $(lsof -tiTCP:3000 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null); do kill "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; done; for p in $(lsof -tiTCP:6379 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null); do kill "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; done; echo "Stopped local dev services (if running)."'
